Which step occurs immediately before the text 'BAKE' is overlaid on the video? A. Brushing yellow liquid onto round dough balls. B. Whisking the milk into the meat mixture. C. Showing the bitten pastry with creamy filling. D. Mixing brown crumbled food with white powder.

Describe what is happening to the dough discs on the baking sheet.
canonical_answer: Eight round pale dough discs are arranged in columns on parchment paper lining a metal baking sheet. Brownish crumbly filling is placed on top of the right column of dough discs. A red silicone pastry brush applies yellow liquid from a glass bowl to the top of the dough. Text overlay identifies the liquid as egg wash during the brushing process.

question: Describe the sequential cooking actions performed on the ground meat throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 6s, raw ground meat is placed in a grey pan and broken apart with a wooden spatula; at 14s, a hand pours white powder labeled flour from a glass bowl onto the browned meat; at 18s, the mixture is stirred with a wooden spoon while the pan sits on a black induction burner.

question: Outline the changes in utensils and ingredients visible during the preparation process.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a metal whisk lies idle on the white surface while a spatula breaks raw meat; at 14s, a glass bowl appears as white powder is scattered over the cooked meat; at 18s, a wooden spoon replaces the spatula to mix the powder into the browned crumbles on the cooktop.

question: What will the person do next after pouring the flour? A. Stir the mixture with a wooden spoon. B. Pour a white liquid into the pan immediately. C. Remove the pan from the heat source. D. Cover the pan with a glass lid.
